# arabicfmt

> Arabic-first formatting for JavaScript & TypeScript. Correct currency for all
> 22 Arab League countries (including the 2025–2026 Unicode currency-symbol
> transition: Saudi Riyal U+20C1, UAE Dirham U+20C3, Omani Rial U+20C4),
> deterministic Umm al-Qura Hijri dates, Arabic number-to-words, تفقيط (spell
> money for cheques), the six CLDR plural forms, RTL/bidi fixes, Arabic
> collation, transliteration/slugs, and IBAN / Saudi-ID validation.
> Zero runtime dependencies. ESM + CJS. Full TypeScript types. ~11 kB min+gzip.

## Install
- npm: `npm install arabicfmt`
- Browser/CDN (no build): `import { formatCurrency } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/arabicfmt/+esm"`
- Subpath imports (tree-shakeable): arabicfmt/currency, /number, /date, /umalqura, /bidi, /text, /validate

## Currency — arabicfmt/currency
- `formatCurrency(value, { currency, numerals?, symbolMode?, accounting?, locale? })`
  - formatCurrency(1234.5, { currency: "SAR", numerals: "arab" }) // "١٬٢٣٤٫٥٠ ر.س"
  - formatCurrency(1.2, { currency: "KWD" }) // "1.200 د.ك" (3 decimals, CLDR-correct)
  - symbolMode: "auto" | "new" (U+20C1 etc.) | "text" (ر.س) | "code" (SAR)
- `spellCurrency(value, { currency, suffix? })` // تفقيط: "ألف ومئتان وأربعة وثلاثون ريالاً وخمسون هللةً"
- `getCurrencyInfo(code)` // symbols, precision, Unicode transition metadata

## Numbers — arabicfmt/number
- `arabicToWords(n, { gender? })` // arabicToWords(1234) → "ألف ومئتان وأربعة وثلاثون"
- `arabicOrdinal(n, { gender? })` // arabicOrdinal(25, { gender: "female" }) → "الخامسة والعشرون"
- `arabicFraction(num, den)` // arabicFraction(3, 4) → "ثلاثة أرباع"
- `countedNoun(n, forms)` // applies Arabic العدد والمعدود agreement to any noun
- `formatNumber(n, opts)`, `formatPercent(ratio, opts)`, `formatCompact(n, opts)` // "١٫٢ مليون"
- `formatDuration(ms)` // 7_500_000 → "ساعتان وخمس دقائق"
- `formatFileSize(bytes)` // 1536 → "1.5 كيلوبايت"
- `formatRelativeTime(date)` // "قبل ٣ أيام"
- `parseNumber(str)` / `parseCurrency(str)` // "١٬٢٣٤٫٥٦" → 1234.56
- `toArabicDigits(str)` / `toLatinDigits(str)` // Eastern ↔ Western digits

## Dates (Hijri) — arabicfmt/umalqura (accurate) or arabicfmt/date (tabular, tiny)
- `formatHijri(date, { numerals?, locale? })` // → "٢٧ ذو الحجة ١٤٤٧ هـ" (Umm al-Qura, deterministic)
- `toHijri(date)` → { year, month, day }
- `fromHijri(year, month, day)` → Date

## Text — arabicfmt/text
- `arabicPlural(n, forms)` / `arabicPluralForm(n)` // 6 CLDR forms: zero/one/two/few/many/other
- `normalizeForSearch(s)`, `stripTashkeel(s)`, `removeTatweel(s)`, `normalizeArabic(s)`
- `sortArabic(arr)` / `compareArabic(a, b)` / `createArabicCollator(opts)` // dictionary-correct order
- `formatList(items, { type? })` // "أحمد ومحمد وعلي" / disjunction: "... أو ..."
- `transliterate(s)` / `slugify(s)` // slugify("مدينة نصر") → "mdynh-nsr"

## Bidi / RTL — arabicfmt/bidi
- `isolateForeign(text)` // wraps LTR runs (phone numbers, Latin) in FSI…PDI so RTL text stops scrambling
- `detectDirection(s)`, `isRTL(s)`, `wrapLTR`, `wrapRTL`, `stripBidi`

## Validation — arabicfmt/validate
- `isValidIBAN(iban)` / `formatIBAN(iban)` // ISO 7064 mod-97
- `isValidSaudiId(id)` / `saudiIdType(id)` // Luhn; returns "citizen" | "resident"

## Notes for code generation
- Always pass the ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. "SAR", "AED", "KWD") to formatCurrency.
- For Eastern-Arabic digits anywhere, pass `numerals: "arab"`.
- The package has ZERO runtime dependencies; safe in Node, browser, Deno, Bun, React Native.

## Links
- README / full docs: https://github.com/cc1a2b/arabicfmt#readme
- Live demo: https://arabicfmt.vercel.app
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/arabicfmt
